description.content: Returns a single random activity, optionally filtered by type, participant count, price range, accessibility (availability), or a specific activity key. Identical to /api/v1/activity.

query.description: Filter activities by category type.
Filter to activities requiring an exact number of participants.
Filter to activities requiring at least this many participants.
Filter to activities requiring at most this many participants.
V1 — exact price as a decimal between 0.0 (free) and 1.0 (expensive).
V1 — minimum price (0.0–1.0, inclusive).
V1 — maximum price (0.0–1.0, inclusive).
V1 — accessibility (also called availability) as a decimal between 0.0 (most accessible) and 1.0 (least accessible).
V1 — minimum accessibility (0.0–1.0).
V1 — maximum accessibility (0.0–1.0).
Look up a single activity by its unique key.

response.name: A random activity matching any supplied filters.
response.body:
{
  "activity": "Learn Express.js",
  "type": "education",
  "participants": 1,
  "price": 0.1,
  "key": "3943506",
  "accessibility": 0.25,
  "link": "https://expressjs.com/"
}

response.name: Bad request or query argument error.

description.content: V1-versioned alias of /api/activity. Returns the legacy v1 activity shape where accessibility is a number from 0.0 to 1.0.

query.description: Filter activities by category type.
Filter to activities requiring an exact number of participants.
Filter to activities requiring at least this many participants.
Filter to activities requiring at most this many participants.
V1 — exact price as a decimal between 0.0 (free) and 1.0 (expensive).
V1 — minimum price (0.0–1.0, inclusive).
V1 — maximum price (0.0–1.0, inclusive).
V1 — accessibility (also called availability) as a decimal between 0.0 (most accessible) and 1.0 (least accessible).
V1 — minimum accessibility (0.0–1.0).
V1 — maximum accessibility (0.0–1.0).
Look up a single activity by its unique key.

response.name: A random activity matching any supplied filters.
response.body:
{
  "activity": "Learn Express.js",
  "type": "education",
  "participants": 1,
  "price": 0.1,
  "key": "3943506",
  "accessibility": 0.25,
  "link": "https://expressjs.com/"
}

response.name: Bad request or query argument error.

description.content: V2 surface. Returns a single random activity wrapped in an envelope object. V2 introduces enumerated accessibility (Few to no challenges, Minor challenges, Major challenges), a categorical price ($..$$$$$), and additional fields (duration, kidFriendly).

query.description: Filter activities by category type.
Filter to activities requiring an exact number of participants.
Filter to activities requiring at least this many participants.
Filter to activities requiring at most this many participants.
V2 — categorical price ladder. Supplied as 1–5 `$` characters ("$" cheapest through "$$$$$" most expensive). Internally mapped to a numeric value.
V2 — minimum price as 1–5 `$` characters.
V2 — maximum price as 1–5 `$` characters.
V2 — exact availability score as a decimal between 0.0 and 1.0.
V2 — minimum availability (0.0–1.0).
V2 — maximum availability (0.0–1.0).

response.name: A random activity wrapped in an activity envelope.
Bad request or query argument error.

description.content: Look up a single activity by its unique key.

response.name: The activity matching the supplied key.
Bad request or query argument error.

description.content: Random or keyed factual snippets (v2 only).
Returns a single random fact wrapped in an envelope.

response.name: A random fact.
Bad request or query argument error.

description.content: Returns the fact matching the supplied key.

response.name: The fact matching the supplied key.
Bad request or query argument error.

description.content: Random or keyed riddles with difficulty filter (v2 only).
Returns a single random riddle, optionally filtered by difficulty (easy, normal, hard).

query.description: Filter riddles by difficulty.

response.name: A random riddle.
Bad request or query argument error.

description.content: Returns the riddle matching the supplied key.

response.name: The riddle matching the supplied key.
Bad request or query argument error.

description.content: Random or keyed website recommendations (v2 only).
Returns a single random website recommendation.

response.name: A random website.
Bad request or query argument error.

description.content: Returns the website matching the supplied key.

response.name: The website matching the supplied key.
Bad request or query argument error.

description.content: Community-submitted content suggestions for review (v2 only).

Submit a community suggestion for a new activity, fact, riddle, or website. Exactly one of activity, fact, riddle, or website must be supplied. Suggestions are queued for moderator review and are not immediately visible in the live API.

response.name: Suggestion accepted and queued for review.
Bad request or query argument error.

description.content:
The Bored API is a free, no-authentication public API that returns suggestions for things to do when you are bored. The canonical implementation is the open-source MEVN (MongoDB / Express / Vue / Node) project maintained by Drew Thoennes at github.com/drewthoennes/Bored-API. The historically hosted instance at https://www.boredapi.com/ has been intermittently or fully unreachable since 2024 (originally hosted on Heroku); community mirrors such as https://bored-api.appbrewery.com continue to serve the dataset. This specification documents both the v1 (legacy, activities-only) and v2 (activities + facts + riddles + websites + suggestions) surfaces of the canonical Drew Thoennes implementation so the API contract is preserved for self-hosting and historical reference.

Contact Support:
 Name: Drew Thoennes
